summary: Applied 2 of 3 actionable MEDIUM-priority suggestions from JUDGE iter 2. Removed Storage_reserves node (and 3 associated edges) to free a phenotype activator slot, then added GIF1→Seed_Size and LEC2→FUS3. Net effect: -1 node, -1 edge. Storage_reserves contribution now folded into ABI3/ABI4 cascade (both retain other outputs reaching phenotype via ABI5).

applied_suggestions.action: Removed Storage_reserves PROCESS node and its 3 edges (ABI3→Storage_reserves, ABI4→Storage_reserves, Storage_reserves→Seed_Size). Added GIF1→Seed_Size (E149, +1). Phenotype now: 5 activators (Integument_Growth, Endosperm_Proliferation, Ovule_size, AGG3, GIF1) + 2 inhibitors (ABA, ABI5). GIF1 coverage rises from 0.25 to 0.38. Storage_reserves was a thin aggregator (only ABI3/ABI4 inputs, no perturbation-relevant biology lost — ABI3 and ABI4 still influence phenotype via ABI5).

Added LEC2→FUS3 (E120, +1). Creates positive feedback FUS3↔LEC2 (canonical LAFL maturation TF mutual activation). Damping=0.7 should stabilise; will monitor for runaway amplification on LEC2 OE perturbation in validation.

rejected_suggestions.rejection_reason: Cannot act — Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW backlog item. WRI1 still cannot be added without a curated downstream edge to a phenotype-reachable node.
Cannot act — Step 1 backlog. TTG2 stays at 0.20 coverage as documented literature_gap.
LOW priority and positive self-loop risk persists. Defer to REFINEMENT if ABI cascade behaviour suggests instability.
